archetype: Dark Cinematic Industrial (Blend of Archetype 5 Jewel & Luxury and Archetype 4 Swiss Brutalist)
concept: Concrete in Motion - Premium, powerful, industrial, and highly kinetic (like a Nike ad).

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none

typography.instructions: Always include font imports from Google Fonts. Headings must be uppercase for the industrial aesthetic. Maintain strict line-heights.

layout_spacing.grid_system: Use Tetris bento grids for features. Standard 12-column logic.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D1C39A] text-[#050505] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-4 px-8 rounded-none hover:bg-[#E5D9B6] transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border-2 border-[#3F3F3F] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-4 px-8 rounded-none hover:border-[#D1C39A] transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-2

cards.base: bg-[#121212] border border-[#262626] rounded-none relative overflow-hidden group
cards.inner_glow: before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-br before:from-[#D1C39A]/5 before:to-transparent before:opacity-0 group-hover:before:opacity-100 before:transition-opacity before:duration-500

hero_background.technical_approach: Use absolute positioned framer-motion divs. Layer 1: Base #050505. Layer 2: Two large blur circles (300px+) using Warm Beige (#D1C39A) and Slate Grey, set to 10-15% opacity, slowly animating diagonally in a loop (y: [-50, 50, -50], x: [-50, 50, -50]). Layer 3: Diagonal speed lines via CSS repeating-linear-gradient at 45deg with low opacity. Layer 4: Floating dust particles using small framer-motion divs with random y/x drifts. Layer 5: Radial gradient spotlight fixed behind the main H1.

motion_and_animations.scroll_reveal: Use Framer Motion whileInView for staggered fading up of elements. initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}
motion_and_animations.hover_effects: Cards slightly scale up (scale: 1.02) and reveal inner subtle gradient. Buttons have a slight slide-up icon animation on hover.

icons.usage: Use thick, industrial icons. Sizes mostly w-6 h-6 or w-8 h-8.

testing.attributes: Every interactive element (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g. data-testid='whatsapp-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Cinematic Industrial archetype. Do not add soft pastel colors or pure white backgrounds.
Ensure all fonts are loaded from Google Fonts (Oswald, Manrope) in index.html or global CSS.

Implement the 'Concrete in Motion' background exactly as specified in motion_and_animations, using pure Tailwind and Framer Motion without requiring complex 3D libraries (Three.js) to keep performance high.
Build standard responsive navigation bar with Logo (PERFECT RMC text) and Links, sticky with backdrop-blur-xl.
Services section should be a 3-column grid of cards on desktop, 1 on mobile.
Process Timeline should be a horizontal scrolling or flex row setup with connecting lines on desktop, vertical on mobile.
Include a dedicated WhatsApp CTA section at the bottom, directing users to +91 8255009999.
Use standard semantic HTML sections with the assigned padding variables.
Ensure high contrast ratios between text and backgrounds (APCA standard).
Include all user data: Phone: +91 82550 09999, +91 7574848571, +91 9328666666. Email: businesshead@perfectrmc.in, perfect_rmc@yahoo.com.
Ensure no Shadcn components are used if they conflict with the raw HTML/Tailwind required for marketing site sections, unless customized to remove default radii (use rounded-none).
